name: Lucky Guy
overview: Born on a dark night, a boy comes into the world and due to a bizarre set of events, gets a locket that makes him the luckiest guy on earth. It gets him to win lotteries, avoid accidents, earn money, respect and get away with it all across school & college- but it comes with a price, and he wonders if love, friendships and relationships are worth giving away for good luck.

trailers.title: Lucky Guy - Official Trailer Ft. Swagger Sharma | Amazon miniTV
